rootNotFound.title: Page not found
rootNotFound.description: The page you are looking for may have been removed or moved to a different URL.
rootNotFound.subLine1: Getting lost can be part of the journey,
rootNotFound.subLine2: but this page really does not exist.

rootError.title: Something went wrong
rootError.description: An unexpected error occurred. Please reload the page or try again in a moment.
